Title: IWS - Verify configuration resets to default on factory reset
2. Design deployed to Core with an IWS component.
3. IWS device is on the network, inventory item name matches device name in Configurator.
4. IWS device is in "OK" state with non-default configuration applied (custom hostname, LED settings, detection zones, network settings, etc.).
Preconditions: 1. Perform a factory reset on the IWS device (via QPM, device web interface, or hardware button).

Title: 2. Wait for the device to complete the reset and reboot.
3. Observe the device status in the inventory.
4. Review all configuration values on the device.
Preconditions: 1. All configuration values return to factory defaults.

Title: 2. The hostname reverts to the default device name.
3. Network settings revert to defaults (DHCP or default static).
4. LED settings, detection zones, and sensor configuration revert to defaults.
5. The device no longer has a relationship with the Core and requires re-commissioning from scratch.
6. No residual custom configuration remains on the device.
7. The Designer component reports the device as "Missing" with no values populated from the device.
8. The device appears as an unpaired/unmatched device on the Q-SYS network.
